creator: teramae@acr.atr.co.jp
text: I use ASUS P2B-D dual mother board (P2 450MHz processors and the latest BIOS) with Adaptec AHA2940U2W SCSI board and Matrox G200 AGP graphic board.  With FreeBSD 3.3-release and later, the PS/2 mouse is recognized but moves very slow.  With 3.2-release, the mouse moves normal.  With the other mother board, I have not experienced it.
